mnemonics.name: SOLID
mnemonics.content: Single responsibility, Open/closed, Liskov, Interface segregation, Dependency inversion

mnemonics.name: DRY KISS YAGNI
mnemonics.content: Don't Repeat, Keep Simple, You Ain't Gonna Need It

formulas.name: Good Design
formulas.formula: Low Coupling + High Cohesion = Maintainable Code
